node.constraint: Use the shared database connection imported from '@/lib/db' (or relative path) for all database operations instead of creating new Database instances. Initialize tables if not exists using the shared connection. Implement a POST handler: if body contains action 'register', insert the user into database. If action 'login', select user, verify password, set a cookie named 'user_session' with the email value (acting as session identifier), and return success. Ensure the route is dynamic and not cached by exporting: export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
Form makes POST requests to '/api/auth' with action 'login' or 'register' on submit

Create a login and registration page at app/login/page.tsx (Amazon classic sign-in design). Display a card containing forms for both Sign-In and Create Account. On success, store user state, set session cookies, and redirect to products catalog page at '/products'.
